text:
# In the Family Court		    Case No: [Case number]

In the Family Court		    Case No: [Case number]

sitting at [Court name]

Before [name of judge] in private on [date] without a hearing.

The parties:	The applicant is [name]

The 1st respondent is [name], the [relationship to child]

The 2nd respondent is [name], the [relationship to child]

(penal notice: not automatically included. if included, the order must be personally served unless the court dispenses with that requirement: fpr 2010, r 37(4))

Penal notice

IMPORTANT WARNING TO [NAME]

If you [NAME] of [ADDRESS] disobey [this order] / [paragraph[s] [insert paragraph number(s)] of this order] you may be held to be in contempt of court and may be imprisoned, fined or have your assets seized.

You have the following legal rights:

to seek legal advice. This right does not entitle you to disobey any part of this order until you have sought legal advice;

if you do not speak or understand English adequately, to have an interpreter present in court at public expense in order to assist you at the hearing of any application relating to this order.

Recitals

(Note these details should be included as an exception to the house rules) The judge read the following documents:

[Insert details]

The judge heard the following oral evidence:

[Insert details]

The court has considered it appropriate to accept the undertakings offered by the respondent in this matter, on the basis of which undertakings these proceedings have been concluded. In accepting those undertakings, the court considered that it would not have been appropriate to attach a power of arrest to any Forced Marriage Protection Order as may have been made as a final order within these proceedings.

The court clearly explained the penal consequences of any breach by the parties of their undertakings to them in court today.
